channel.title: Eudaimonia Feed
channel.description: RSS entries filtered for lasting importance, personal growth, and eudaimonia. Updated 4x daily.

item.title: 988 hotline linked to thousands fewer youth suicide deaths since launch, study finds
item.description:
Nearly 4,400 fewer U.S. teens and young adults died by suicide than projected in the first two-and-a-half years of the 988 mental health crisis hotline, a sign the program is working even as it faces long-term funding challenges.
[Eudaimonia Filter — Lasting: 8/10 | Growth: 9/10 | Eudaimonia: 10/10 — Proven reduction in youth suicide deaths directly enhances human flourishing and well-being.]
